title: conringia orientalis
intro: Conringia orientalis, also known as the Chinese Bugloss or Oriental Bugloss, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Conringia orientalis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Conringia orientalis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems.
